### Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Closes #(issue)

### Checklist:

- [ ] Title is named in correspondence to [Process Requirements](https://gitlab.pg.innopolis.university/swp_26/swp_26/-/blob/main/Process_Requirements.md#product-backlog-items-and-scope)
- [ ] I changed description placeholder to a real detailed description
- [ ] I put the issue number into the PR description
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code

### Changelog presence

**Pick exactly one**:
- [ ] Added to Changelog
- [ ] Not applicable because change is not user-visible
